title: satureja horvatii subsp. horvatii
intro: Satureja horvatii subsp. horvatii, also known as the Dalmatian savory, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is native to the Balkan Peninsula and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Satureja horvatii subsp. horvatii include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and acting as an antiseptic to prevent infections. Satureja horvatii subsp. horvatii can be consumed in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to promote overall well-being.
